1.title: 0:00-10:00 Warm-Up
1.description:
2 min row easy
McGill curl-up 2×10
Bird dog 2×10/side
Goblet squat 10 reps
Back squat empty bar 3×5
Leg swing 10 each side
1.notes: Lower back activation every session. Film squat warm-up for technique baseline.

1.title: 10:00-20:00 Benchmark – 3RM Back Squat
1.description:
Build to heavy 3RM Back Squat.
Sets: 60% (78kg), 70% (91kg), 80% (104kg), then 3RM attempt.
Log result for Week 11 retest.
1.notes: True benchmark – honest max. Rest 3 min between attempts. Stop if form breaks.

2.title: 0:00-10:00 Warm-Up
2.description:
3 min bike easy
Dead bug 2×10
Side plank 2×30 sec each
Banded shoulder distraction 60 sec each
Inchworm 5 reps
2.notes: Lower back activation. Shoulders fully fresh for Fran.

3.title: 0:00-10:00 Warm-Up
3.description:
2 min row easy
Hip hinge drill 10 reps
Glute bridge 2×15
PVC pass-through 15 reps
OHS with PVC 10 reps
Ankle circles 10 each
3.notes: Hip hinge and overhead mobility critical for snatch. Move slowly.

4.title: 0:00-10:00 Warm-Up
4.description:
2 min ski erg easy
Glute bridge 2×15
Dead bug 2×10
Banded monster walk 15 steps each
Wall ball practice 10 reps
4.notes: Hip extension warm-up. Lower back activation before C&J and Wall Balls.

5.title: 0:00-10:00 Warm-Up
5.description:
2 min bike easy
Bird dog 2×10/side
Glute bridge 2×15
Goblet squat 10 reps
Back squat primer 3×3 @ 60%
5.notes: Week 2 – consistent lower back activation. Film squat for week-over-week comparison.
